basic_details.job_title: ICAR IVRI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 at ivri.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ICAR IVRI JRF Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a Postgraduate degree in Basic Biological Sciences/ Life Sciences or a Bachelor’s/ Postgraduate degree in Veterinary Science, Animal Science, or allied disciplines along with NET/ GATE or other prescribed national-level qualifications can apply online on or before 25 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application l

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree including the integrated PG degree in Basic Biological Science/Life sciences or Bachelor/ Post Graduate in professional courses preferably in Veterinary Science/ Animal Science & Allied from recognized institute/University.
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree including the integrated PG degree in Basic Biological Science/Life sciences or Bachelor/Post Graduate in professional courses preferably in Veterinary Science/ Animal Science & Allied from recognized institute/University selected through a) National Eligibility Test CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or b) National level Exam conducted by Central Gov./Allied Agencies/Institutions viz. DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. Desirable: Having evidence of experience in animal health management, lab animal handling, haemato-biochemical analysis and knowledge in computer data management.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000 per month + 7400 (20% HRA) = Rs. 44,400 monthly as per CCRH guidelines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICAR-IVRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR-IVRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Details
ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate degree including the integrated PG degree in Basic Biological Science/Life sciences or Bachelor/Post Graduate in professional courses preferably in Veterinary Science/ Animal Science & Allied from recognized institute/University selected through a) National Eligibility Test CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or b) National level Exam conducted by Central Gov./Allied Agencies/Institutions viz. DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. Desirable: Having evidence of experience in animal health management, lab animal handling, haemato-biochemical analysis and knowledge in computer data management.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000 per month + 7400 (20% HRA) = Rs. 44,400 monthly as per CCRH guidelines.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICAR-IVRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 44,400 per month. This is a competitive stipend for the role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduate degree in Basic Biological Science/Life sciences or a Bachelor/Post Graduate in professional courses like Veterinary Science/Animal Science & Allied, selected through NET/GATE or equivalent national-level exams.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) be posted?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR-IVRI) located in Izatnagar, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in this recruitment drive by ICAR-IVRI.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ICAR-IVRI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is online. Candidates must submit their applications through the designated online portal.

faq.question: Q10. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is scheduled to be held on 28th July 2026. Candidates should be present on this date.
